title: urandra capitatus
intro: Urandra capitatus, also known as the Indian snake root or Rattlesnake root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Urandra capitatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Urandra capitatus can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the roots in hot water, or it can be made into a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
